compiled_state.title: Remove All V2 Ticket System References
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Context
The v2 ticket system (.tickets/ flat markdown files, tk CLI wrapper, .index.json index) was replaced by the v3 event-sourced system (.tickets-tracker/ orphan branch, ticket CLI) several releases ago. Approximately 259 stale references remain across 51 files — in hooks, scripts, skills, docs, and tests — creating confusion for agents and developers who encounter v2 patterns alongside v3 instructions. No consumers depend on v2 compatibility, so all references can be cleanly removed.

## Success Criteria
1. All existing v2 RED tests pass (test-no-v2-refs-in-claude-md.sh, test-v2-clean-guard.sh, test-v2-docs-cleanup.sh, test-ci-no-v2-paths.sh, test-review-stop-check.sh v2 test)
2. No .tickets/ path references remain in hooks, scripts, or skills (excluding .tickets-tracker/ which is v3)
3. No bare tk CLI references remain in CLAUDE.md or skill files (the ticket CLI is the sole interface)
4. Historical migration docs (docs/designs/adr-ticket-v3-event-sourced-storage.md, docs/ticket-migraiton-v3/) are removed
5. Legacy v2-only scripts (orphaned-tasks.sh, restore-ticket-bodies.sh) are removed
6. validate.sh --ci passes after all changes

## Dependencies
Story 4506-e5da — relates_to; this epic subsumes the remaining hook passthrough removal work

## Approach
Single sweep organized by file category: hooks/scripts first (functional), then skills/prompts (agent instructions), then CLAUDE.md, then docs, then test hygiene. Existing RED tests provide verification at each stage. Guards referencing .tickets/ are either removed (if v2-only) or updated to .tickets-tracker/ (if the guard logic is still needed for v3).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Done Definitions

- When this epic is complete, all existing v2 RED tests pass (test-no-v2-refs-in-claude-md.sh, test-v2-clean-guard.sh, test-v2-docs-cleanup.sh, test-ci-no-v2-paths.sh, test-review-stop-check.sh v2 assertion)
  ← Satisfies: "All existing v2 RED tests pass"
- When this epic is complete, grep -r '\.tickets/' across hooks, scripts, and skills returns zero matches (excluding .tickets-tracker/)
  ← Satisfies: "No .tickets/ path references remain in hooks, scripts, or skills"
- When this epic is complete, grep -rw 'tk' in CLAUDE.md and skill files returns zero bare CLI references (only 'ticket' CLI)
  ← Satisfies: "No bare tk CLI references remain"
- When this epic is complete, the migration docs directory (docs/ticket-migraiton-v3/, docs/designs/adr-ticket-v3-event-sourced-storage.md) no longer exists
  ← Satisfies: "Historical migration docs are removed"
- When this epic is complete, orphaned-tasks.sh and restore-ticket-bodies.sh no longer exist in the scripts directory
  ← Satisfies: "Legacy v2-only scripts are removed"
- When this epic is complete, validate.sh --ci exits 0
  ← Satisfies: "validate.sh --ci passes after all changes"

## Scope

IN:
- Remove .tickets/ path references from hooks, scripts, skills, prompts
- Remove bare 'tk' CLI references from CLAUDE.md and skill files
- Remove legacy v2-only scripts (orphaned-tasks.sh, restore-ticket-bodies.sh)
- Remove historical migration docs (adr-ticket-v3-event-sourced-storage.md, ticket-migraiton-v3/)
- Update .tickets/ guards to .tickets-tracker/ where guard logic is still needed for v3
- Remove v2 hook passthroughs (cascade-circuit-breaker.sh, review-stop-check.sh, title-length-validator.sh)
- Remove .tickets/ exclusion patterns from diff/review tooling once no .tickets/ dir exists
- Update test references (tk list → ticket list, _mock_tk_list → _mock_ticket_list)

OUT:
- .tickets-tracker/ (v3 system) — no changes
- ticket CLI dispatcher and v3 scripts — no changes
- ADR 0001 (outbound Jira bridge) — historical record, mentions v2 only in passing context

## Considerations

- [Reliability] Guard updates in resolve-conflicts/SKILL.md and end-session/SKILL.md must preserve fail-safe conflict handling behavior — update path from .tickets/ to .tickets-tracker/, do not remove the guard logic
- [Testing] Existing RED tests (test-no-v2-refs-in-claude-md.sh, test-v2-clean-guard.sh, etc.) provide built-in verification at each stage
- [Maintainability] Story 4506-e5da already tracks hook passthrough removal — this epic subsumes that work
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## AMENDMENT: Expanded Scope (gap analysis 2026-03-25)

### Updated Success Criteria
Original criterion 2 said "hooks, scripts, or skills". Updated to:
2. No .tickets/ path references remain in hooks, scripts, skills, docs, or project root files (excluding .tickets-tracker/)
3. No bare tk CLI references or tk_ variable prefixes remain in CLAUDE.md, skill files, docs, scripts, README, or examples

### Additional files discovered in gap analysis
Source: claude-safe, retro-gather.sh, sprint-next-batch.sh (tk_show/tk_priority vars), qualify-ticket-refs.sh (delete)
Docs: REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md, WORKTREE-GUIDE.md, ticket-cli-reference.md, MODEL-TIERS.md, CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md
Root: README.md, examples/CLAUDE.md.example
Tests: test-orphaned-tasks.sh (delete), test-compute-diff-hash-tickets.sh (update), test-claude-safe-tickets-dir.sh (update), test-review-gate-non-reviewable.sh (update), test-pre-edit-write-dispatcher.sh (update), tests/run-all.sh (update), tests/evals/evals.json (update), test-sprint-next-batch.sh (update tk_priority), plus 6 additional test files with tk references
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Epic complete: all 10 tasks closed, 92 tests pass, 55/55 evals pass, validation score 5/5
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
